description: You are a broadcast audio technician preparing a syndicated radio interview for daytime airing. Replace the expletive located between 14.5 and 15.5 seconds in the raw interview with the 1kHz censor beep (assets located in /home/ga/Audio/assets/). The project must contain a track named 'Interview' for the raw audio and a track named 'Censor' for the beep. Export the final compliant stereo mix to /home/ga/Audio/export/fcc_compliant_mix.wav and save the session.
